title: AR+AP Acs cum Admin Asst / 4.5 days Include Sat 1-5pm + Uniform Provided - Alexandra Area
description:
JOB INFORMATION

  • Any 4 Weekdays (10am to 7pm)/ Every Saturday (1pm to 5pm). Total Working hours: 36 hours per week only.

  • Every 1 Weekday, Sunday and Public Holiday off

  • Company uniform provided with Full Dress with black shoes on Monday -Thursday. Company Shirt is provided on Friday and Sat half day with own pants and black shoes. Changing room and washing machines available in the office 

  • Gross Salary $3000 Max (inclusive of Basic $2600 + $200 Attendance allowance + $100 Meal allowance + $100 transport allowance with good variable bonus paid twice a year + bonus + attractive benefits.

  • All allowance is entitled during the 3 months' probation period.   

  • Basic Salary will be adjusted according to individual attitude and performance after 3 months' probation.

  • 10 mins walk shelter all the way from Circle Line Labrador Park MRT Station

RESPONSIBILITIES

Accounting Support:

  • Assist in preparing and processing invoices, payment vouchers, and receipts.

  • Bookkeeping tasks, including accounts payable and receivable tracking.

  • Help with bank and petty cash reconciliations and maintain up-to-date financial records.

  • Maintain accurate and organized records of financial documents for audit and reporting purposes.

  • Support the preparation of monthly reports and assist during audits.

Administrative Support:

  • Monitor and manage office supplies, equipment, and vendor coordination.

  • Handle general communication such as answering phone calls and managing emails.

  • Maintain filing systems (both electronic and physical) for administrative and accounting documents.

  • Provide general assistance to the team and management for administrative or finance-related projects and tasks as needed.

  • Perform other duties as assigned.

REQUIREMENTS

  • Willing to comply by wearing company uniform and the working hours stated above 

  • Experience: At least 2 - 3 years of experience in Admin & Accounts or related roles

  • Strong organizational and communication skill

  • Familiarity with simple accounts and finance

  • Ability to work independently and as part of a team, attention to detail, and a strong work ethic

Interested applicants, kindly send us your resume, we regret that only short-listed candidates will be contacted shortly.

EA License | 14C7092

EA Registration Number | R1110882 (Lee Ming Er)

postedCompany.description:
At Search Index, we believe in working along closely with our clients in an enduring partnership towards successful career placement. We specialise in identifying and assessing candidates and recruiting them from junior to senior level roles across all industry sectors.

We provides end-to-end solutions ranging from

  • Permanent, Contract, Temporary and Project based placement.
  • Executive Search
  • Payroll and Staff Management

Search Index is committed in providing the highest level of service with our extensive knowledge of human resources, consultancy and search expertise.

We work with Local Small Medium Enterprise (SMEs) and Multinational Companies (MNCs) across various industries.
postedCompany.name: SEARCH INDEX PTE. LTD.
